Package com.irurueta.geometry.io

LoaderPLY.LoaderIteratorPLY.BinaryLittleEndianUshortReadValueFromStreamListener, LoaderPLY.LoaderIteratorPLY.BinaryUcharReadValueFromStreamListener, LoaderPLY.LoaderIteratorPLY.BinaryUint8ReadValueFromStreamListener
    public interface PLYReadValueFromStreamListener
    Listener to read the appropriate amount of bytes from a PLY file corresponding to this data type. The amount of bytes read are stored within the read buffer.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void readFromStream​(ByteBuffer buffer)
      Reads needed data from stream.

    • Method Detail

      • readFromStream

        void readFromStream​(ByteBuffer buffer)
             throws IOException
        Reads needed data from stream.
        Parameters:
        buffer - Buffer where data is stored.
        Throws:
        IOException - if an I/O error occurs.
